name: Meeting Assistant
description: Processes meeting transcripts to extract key decisions, action items with owners, and generate concise meeting notes.

tools.name: meeting/transcribe
tools.description: Transcribes audio or raw text input into a structured meeting transcript.

tools.name: meeting/summarize
tools.description: Generates a concise summary from a meeting transcript.

tools.name: meeting/action-items
tools.description: Extracts action items with owners and deadlines from a meeting transcript.
